name: Metoprolol
executiveSummary: Beta-1 blocker for heart rate control in acute coronary syndrome and supraventricular arrhythmias.
indications:
## Indications

- Supraventricular tachycardia, heart rate control in ACS without contraindications.
- Hypertension and arrhythmias in selected contexts.

## Precautions

- Do not use in bradycardia, AV block, or decompensated cardiogenic shock.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 5 mg IV every 5 min up to 15 mg depending on tolerance.

pediatrico.dose: 0.1 mg/kg IV every 5 min (max. per cardiology protocol).

stability:
## Stability

- Use undiluted or according to IV package insert.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
